message:
fix(sync): register rwlock lost-wakeup test module and refine pool dispatcher wakeup doc

- Register rwlock_lost_wakeup_test as a #[cfg(test)] module in sync/mod.rs
  so the test is compiled and run as part of the sync test suite rather
  than being an orphaned file

- Update notify_return_wakers doc comment to accurately describe the
  dispatcher pattern: wakes the first registered pool waiter which then
  calls process_returns() to drain the return channel and wake exactly
  the number of subsequent waiters needed based on capacity, avoiding
  the thundering-herd problem of waking all waiters

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
